notes: Core mechanics exist but the map has only 26 rows vs expected 31 (MAP_STRING mismatch), causing maze rendering/collision issues; ghost movement is erratic due to non-tile-aligned positioning with floating-point speed, making the game barely playable.
Playable but notably incomplete and inaccurate as Pac-Man, with a malformed map/row mismatch, simplified ghost logic, and several gameplay fidelity issues despite no obvious fatal JS crash.
